headline: Lockheed Martin’s New Space Contracts Extend Long Term Earnings Story
summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) received a $1.84b Andromeda program contract to support U.S. space based domain awareness. The company also secured a $105m GPS IIIF contract covering satellite launch and testing activities. These multi year awards extend Lockheed Martin's role in U.S. military space technology beyond traditional air and missile programs. For investors watching NYSE:LMT, these contracts arrive with the stock around $628.5 and meaningful long term performance already on the board,...

headline: The Aerospace ETF Wall Street Overlooks: Why XAR’s Smaller Holdings Are Outrunning the Giants
summary: NATO’s European allies and Canada increased their defense outlays by roughly 20% in 2025 alone. For investors capturing that structural shift, the question is how to own aerospace and defense. SPDR S&P Aerospace & Defense ETF (NYSEARCA:XAR) offers a distinctive answer.
